rows.description: — 21 Recd on Acct of the Treasury the ¼ Part of £75-13-4 find Money on Mr. Comyns: Lease Lad Lane
rows.notes: Description drawn from `gemini-flash` (more accurate on '¼' symbol, '£75-13-4' amount *within text*, 'Comyns', and 'Lad Lane'). Amounts (19 3 4) are clearly visible in the dedicated columns and taken from `gpt-5-mini` (which `gemini-flash` incorrectly left empty). Visual inspection confirms 'Recd' and 'Acct' without punctuation. The descriptive text suggests a calculation of '¼ Part of £75-13-4' (which would be £18-18-4), but the recorded amount is 19-3-4. The written amount is extracted as seen.
rows.english_description: Received one quarter share of funds found on Mr Comyns' lease of Lad Lane, paid into the treasury account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Received one quarter share of £75 13s 4d found on Mr Comyns' lease for Lad Lane, amounting to £19 3s 4d.
